candidates.why: This is a COGS-related D&A component, but it appears as a sub-component of the selected parent bucket 'Cost of Operating Revenue' / 'Cost of Revenues - Total'. The total closely matches Material Expenses plus these D&A components, so adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS row is a broad total that already appears to include the separate amortization and depreciation component lines.
No explicit SG&A-related depreciation/amortisation row is visible above the financial section. The only visible D&A rows belong to Cost of Revenues, not SG&A.
